scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check
scripts.format: oxfmt --write README.md package.json tsconfig.json wrangler.jsonc .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json src public
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check README.md package.json tsconfig.json wrangler.jsonc .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json src public
